violations.text: Several food items stored in the Low Boy Cooler below the 2 toaster ovens were observed held at 45 to 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per the owner on the phone, food items were moved to the Low Boy Cooler from colder refrigeration recently prior to inspection. Food items were moved back to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

At the time of inspection, the low boy cooler below the 2 toaster ovens was observed to be in need of repair or adjustment. The unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 50 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures observed at 45 to 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Use of the unit for Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods is to be discontinued until serviced or repaired and maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Per the Owner on the phone, unit is not to be used until properly serviced/repaired/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment moved to the warewashing area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
